headline: Paycom Software (PAYC) Stock Just Moved From Growth Indexes To Russell Value
summary: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) has been removed from several Russell growth indices as part of a recent index rebalancing. The stock is being added to the Russell 2500 and Russell 2500 Value indices, shifting its benchmark exposure toward smaller and value-focused segments. These changes may influence which institutional investors track or hold NYSE:PAYC through index-linked products. Paycom Software enters this index reshuffle with its share price at $127.18 and a mixed recent track record...
